name: FINITE: B2B Marketing Podcast for Tech, Software & SaaS
description: The FINITE podcast is the leading B2B marketing podcast, sitting down with the world's most innovative B2B marketers in the tech, software & SaaS sectors to talk all things B2B marketing & B2B growth.FINITE is the community for B2B Technology & SaaS Marketers to connect, share, learn & grow as peers. Our B2B Marketing Podcast podcast explores the latest trends and challenges in B2B marketing by interviewing leading senior marketers from across B2B technology, software & SaaS companies. In each e

recent_episodes.title: #182 - Hyper-Personalisation, AI Ethics, and the Future of B2B Marketing with Dario Debarbieri, CMO at HCL Software
recent_episodes.description:
In this episode of the FINITE Podcast, Jodi sits down with the brilliant Dario Debarbieri, CMO at HCL Software. With a career at the intersection of marketing and AI, Dario offers a candid look at the Intelligence Economy and what it means for the modern B2B marketer.

We explore a world where artificial intelligence interacts with audiences in real-time, reading the sentiment of minute digital movements to deliver personalized content in exactly the right context. Dario explains why

recent_episodes.title: #181 - Scaling Millions in Community-Led Pipeline with Kris Rudeegraap, Co-Founder and Co-CEO at Sendoso
recent_episodes.description:
How do you turn organic excitement for your product into a structured engine that drives millions in pipeline and 71% higher account spend? 

In this episode of the FINITE Podcast, Jodi sits down with Kris Rudeegraap, CEO and Founder of Sendoso, to peel back the curtain on their sophisticated community ecosystem. Kris breaks down how Sendoso manages four distinct community tiers - from power users to alumni - and the specific tech stack they use to automate "j

recent_episodes.title: #180 - Exploring Synthetic Data with Kate O’Keeffe, CEO and Co-Founder at Heatseeker
recent_episodes.description:
We’re all starting to hear about it, but what is synthetic data? Simply put, synthetic data is "fake" data that is mathematically manufactured to mirror the patterns and behaviours of real-world datasets. 

For B2B marketers, this means using AI to create a digital "twin" of your customer base. Instead of waiting weeks for a survey to come back, you use a model trained on your existing customer calls, ads, and behavioural data to predict how an audience will react.

However, it isn'

score_reason: Leading B2B marketing podcast interviewing innovative marketers about AI, personalization, and growth—strong match for Andreas's marketing and AI expertise.

key_themes: AI integration and strategy in B2B marketing
Humanization and authenticity in an AI-saturated market
Practical growth strategies from experienced practitioners
enrichment.relevant_episode: #180 - Exploring Synthetic Data with Kate O'Keeffe, CEO and Co-Founder at Heatseeker — Andreas's Ditto platform directly applies synthetic data to solve the exact problem this episode explores: using AI to predict customer behavior without waiting weeks for traditional research.
enrichment.coverage_gap: How to convince traditional, risk-averse industries (boards, commodity organizations, non-tech verticals) to adopt AI and data-driven decision-making—the practical friction between legacy thinking and AI adoption in non-SaaS sectors.
enrichment.suggested_hook: The only AI speaker who's actually convinced a commodity board that data beats gut instinct—and scaled a company on it.
